onboarding.welcome_title: Level up in Aevora as you level up in real life.
onboarding.welcome_body: Keep a few meaningful vows, and the city will answer.
onboarding.goal_title: What do you want more of right now?
onboarding.life_areas_title: Which life areas matter most this month?
onboarding.blocker_title: What usually gets in your way?
onboarding.daily_load_title: How many daily vows can you realistically keep?
onboarding.tone_title: What tone do you want from Aevora?
onboarding.magical_moment_title: The city answers your first kept vow.
today.headline: Today's vows
today.empty_title: Choose your first vow to begin.
vow.cap_reached_title: You have reached your active vow limit.
world.headline: World
world.degraded_cached_state_title: Showing your last saved world state.
paywall.headline: Unlock your full journey in Aevora
paywall.body: Premium expands your world, your witness surfaces, and your active vow breadth. Your free path stays intact.
notifications.education_title: Let Aevora keep the district in view
notifications.education_body: Turn on notifications after setup so vow reminders and witness beats can pull you back without friction.
states.today.no_active_vows.title: No active vows yet.
states.today.completion_queued_offline.t: Saved offline. We'll sync when you're back online.
states.today.active_vow_cap_reached.titl: Your active vow cap is full.
states.world.reward_pending.title: Your district update is waiting for confirmation.
content.family.dawnbound.title: Dawnbound
content.family.dawnbound.summary: You keep the city's wards by showing up with courage and steadiness.
content.family.dawnbound.overlay: You frame progress as protection, oath, and civic courage.
content.family.archivist.title: Archivist
content.family.archivist.summary: You restore pattern and memory so the city can remember itself.
content.family.archivist.overlay: You frame progress as understanding, order, and restored pattern.
content.family.hearthkeeper.title: Hearthkeeper
content.family.hearthkeeper.summary: You keep warmth alive through nourishment, rhythm, and care.
content.family.hearthkeeper.overlay: You frame progress as nourishment, warmth, and neighborhood morale.
content.family.chartermaker.title: Chartermaker
content.family.chartermaker.summary: You mend civic order through stewardship, supply, and follow-through.
content.family.chartermaker.overlay: You frame progress as repair, stewardship, and reliable structure.
content.identity.knight.name: Knight
content.identity.knight.summary: A steadfast guardian of small but vital promises.
content.identity.knight.overlay: Each kept vow feels like another lantern held against the dark.
content.identity.paladin.name: Paladin
content.identity.paladin.summary: A bright keeper of vows who turns discipline into shelter.
content.identity.paladin.overlay: Your cadence feels like a ward renewed.
content.identity.ranger.name: Ranger
content.identity.ranger.summary: A watcher of thresholds who keeps moving even when days shift.
content.identity.ranger.overlay: Your momentum clears the road for others.
content.identity.mage.name: Mage
content.identity.mage.summary: A sigil-worker who restores patterns one repetition at a time.
content.identity.mage.overlay: Every kept vow makes the hidden grammar of the city glow.
content.identity.scholar.name: Scholar
content.identity.scholar.summary: A patient student of memory, habit, and honest return.
content.identity.scholar.overlay: Your consistency helps the city remember what matters.
content.identity.farmer.name: Farmer
content.identity.farmer.summary: A grower who trusts steady tending over sudden miracles.
content.identity.farmer.overlay: The city answers the same way soil does: through repeated care.
content.identity.baker.name: Baker
content.identity.baker.summary: A keeper of warmth whose rhythm feeds more than one life.
content.identity.baker.overlay: Each kept vow is another ember coaxed into bread and comfort.
content.identity.cafe_keeper.name: Cafe Keeper
content.identity.cafe_keeper.summary: A host who turns repetition into refuge and welcome.
content.identity.cafe_keeper.overlay: Your consistency makes space for people to gather again.
content.identity.merchant.name: Merchant
content.identity.merchant.summary: A steward of exchange who keeps the city's promises moving.
content.identity.merchant.overlay: Each kept vow closes one more gap in the chain of supply.
content.identity.charterlord.name: Charterlord
content.identity.charterlord.summary: A civic keeper who believes order can still be humane.
content.identity.charterlord.overlay: Your follow-through makes the city's promises hold.
content.district.ember_quay.title: Ember Quay
content.district.ember_quay.summary: A waterfront quarter living on memory, labor, and a shuttered oven.
content.district.ember_quay.mood.dim: The quarter is quiet, tired, and waiting.
content.district.ember_quay.mood.stirrin: A few warm lights answer your effort.
content.district.ember_quay.mood.rebuild: More of the district remembers its rhythm.
content.district.ember_quay.mood.rekindl: The quarter is alive again with ovens, lanterns, and voices.
content.district.ember_quay.change.dim: The streets still hold their breath.
content.district.ember_quay.change.stirr: A warm pulse returns to the stones.
content.district.ember_quay.change.rebui: Shutters lift and old routines begin to hold.
content.district.ember_quay.change.rekin: The bakery burns bright and the district gathers again.
content.npc.maerin_vale.name: Maerin Vale
content.npc.maerin_vale.summary: Quarter warden, practical guide, and witness to the city's return.
content.npc.sera_quill.name: Sera Quill
content.npc.sera_quill.summary: Junior archivist with ink-stained hands and a fast mind.
content.npc.tovan_hearth.name: Tovan Hearth
content.npc.tovan_hearth.summary: Master baker of the shuttered oven and quiet anchor of Ember Quay.
content.npc.brigant_hal.name: Brigant Hal
content.npc.brigant_hal.summary: Captain-in-training who respects effort more than bravado.
content.npc.ilya_fen.name: Ilya Fen
content.npc.ilya_fen.summary: Charter clerk who keeps records crisp and humor dry.
content.npc.pollen.name: Pollen
content.npc.pollen.summary: A Lantern Fox who appears where the city begins to trust again.
content.chapter.starter_arc.title: The Ember That Returned
content.chapter.starter_arc.summary: A week of kept cadence helps reopen the oven at Ember Quay.
content.chapter.starter_arc.tomorrow: Tomorrow, another small promise can carry the quarter farther.
content.chapter.chapter_one.title: The Seven Markets Remember
content.chapter.chapter_one.summary: The bakery was only the first wound. Cyrane has more to mend.
content.chapter.chapter_one.tomorrow: The city has farther roads ahead.
content.quest.starter_day_1.title: Arrival in a Dim Quarter
content.quest.starter_day_1.summary: Keep one vow today and show Ember Quay that rhythm can return.
content.quest.starter_day_2.title: Ash in the Stones
content.quest.starter_day_2.summary: A little warmth lingers now. Keep going so the quarter can trust it.
content.quest.starter_day_3.title: The Missing Piece
content.quest.starter_day_3.summary: A clue surfaces. Your steadiness helps more of the work line up.
content.quest.starter_day_4.title: Rumors in the Canal Lanes
content.quest.starter_day_4.summary: The trouble runs deeper than one shuttered oven. Keep the cadence.
content.quest.starter_day_5.title: A Night of Cooling Embers
content.quest.starter_day_5.summary: Even cooling days can return to warmth. Come back gently.
content.quest.starter_day_6.title: The Quarter Gathers
content.quest.starter_day_6.summary: More people are beginning to believe the oven can burn again.
content.quest.starter_day_7.title: Oven Rekindled
content.quest.starter_day_7.summary: Your week's cadence helps Ember Quay gather around warm bread again.
content.problem.starter_oven_crisis.summ: The bakery has fallen silent, and the quarter's rhythm is failing with it.
content.problem.starter_oven_crisis.reso: The oven burns again. The district remembers what steady care can do.
content.vow.walk_10.title: Walk 10 minutes
content.vow.read_10_pages.title: Read 10 pages
content.vow.plan_top_3.title: Plan your top 3 priorities
content.vow.journal_line.title: Write one journal line
content.vow.make_something_small.title: Make something small for 15 minutes
content.moment.oven_glow.title: The oven glows
content.moment.oven_glow.summary: For one breath, warmth returns to the shuttered oven.
content.moment.ward_lantern.title: A ward lantern relights
content.moment.ward_lantern.summary: A nearby lantern answers your kept cadence with a steady glow.
content.moment.canal_gate.title: The canal gate stirs
content.moment.canal_gate.summary: A long-stuck mechanism shudders toward repair.
content.moment.pollen_emerges.title: Pollen emerges
content.moment.pollen_emerges.summary: A Lantern Fox steps into the light as the district begins to trust again.
content.tomorrow.day_1: Return tomorrow. Ember Quay has started listening.
content.tomorrow.day_2: Return tomorrow. The warmth will hold better if you do.
content.tomorrow.day_3: Return tomorrow. More of the quarter is ready to answer.
content.tomorrow.day_4: Return tomorrow. The city is beginning to show you where it hurts.
content.tomorrow.day_5: Return tomorrow. Cooling is not the same as lost.
content.tomorrow.day_6: Return tomorrow. The quarter is almost ready to gather.
content.tomorrow.day_7: You rekindled the oven. Return tomorrow to see what else Cyrane remembers.
content.item.hearth_apron_common.name: Hearth Apron
content.item.ember_quay_token.name: Ember Quay Token
content.dialogue.maerin_vale.day_1: You needn't do everything. Keep one promise today. Let the quarter feel it.
content.dialogue.maerin_vale.day_5: Cooling is not failure. Come back while the embers still answer.
content.dialogue.sera_quill.day_3: Patterns return when someone repeats the right thing long enough.
content.dialogue.tovan_hearth.day_1: If the oven glows again, even for a breath, folk here will remember hope.
content.dialogue.tovan_hearth.day_7: There it is. Warm bread, warm hands, and proof that steady work still counts.
content.dialogue.brigant_hal.day_4: Consistency is a kind of guard duty. Quiet, but it holds the line.
content.dialogue.ilya_fen.day_4: A city breaks by inches. It is repaired the same way.
content.dialogue.pollen.day_3: Pollen tilts its head, then curls beside the first warm lantern.
